name: Southern Delight Peanut Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the baking chocolate.
2. In a saucepan, combine the water, sugar, and corn syrup. Heat over medium to high heat until it reaches a soft ball stage (234 - 238 F).
3. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
4. Add the grated chocolate, peanuts, and vanilla extract to the cooled mixture.
5. Stir until the mixture begins to crystalize.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
7. Allow to cool completely before serving.
